CustomField.formula: IF( RecordTypeId = '012o00000003bU2',HYPERLINK('https://cgph.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00O6O000008Sd4eUAC/view?queryScope=userFolders&fv2='& Name ,"CLICK HERE"), HYPERLINK('https://cgph.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00O6O000008Sd4eUAC/view?queryScope=userFolders&fv2='& Development_address__r.Name ,"CLICK HERE"))
CustomField.label: TEST Dev IF Status
